title: The Final Decision
text: 72 hours. That's how long you have before the Integrity Engineer destroys all the evidence.
Kaeda is at the terminal, a digital map of the Yohualticit building open.
[KAEDA] "We have three ways in. Each one depends on what you've built so far."
[KAEDA] "Choose."

choices.label: 📋 Exposure — deliver evidence to the press
🗣️ Negotiation — find the villain in person
⚠️ Go unprepared — don't wait any longer

title: ⚔️ Route: Direct Confrontation
text: You choose the most direct path: invade the Engineer's terminal through the LDI and face him in the arena.
Kaeda adjusts your SBI for the attack.
[KAEDA] "He'll be waiting. But he won't expect you to come through the main arena."
[KAEDA] "It's going to be a dirty fight. No rules."
You connect. The arena materializes around you.
NULL_ENTITY is there. Waiting.

title: 📋 Route: Public Exposure
text: You hand over the entire dossier to the Organization. They have press contacts in the MDR.
Kaeda coordinates the operation.
[KAEDA] "The evidence is solid. Logs, financial records, digital signature."
[KAEDA] "It'll take a few hours, but when the story breaks, he won't have anywhere to run."
You wait. The Organization's terminal transmits the data.
And, an hour later, the notification arrives:
[SYSTEM] "ENG_INTEGRITY_47 — Access revoked. Internal investigation initiated."
It worked. The villain is exposed. You won without a single blow.

title: 🗣️ Route: Negotiation
text: You arrange a meeting in the MDR. Coffee. No weapons.
The Integrity Engineer shows up. He's a thin man, deep dark circles, cheap suit.
He doesn't look like a villain. He looks like someone who made wrong choices.
You show him the evidence.
"You're not going to turn this in." — his voice trembles.
"If you do, I lose everything. My job. My freedom."
He offers a deal: the gamblers' names in exchange for not being reported.
What do you do?

choices.label: Accept the deal — names of the gamblers
Refuse — hand everything over to the Organization

title: The Deal
text: You accept. He hands over a chip with the names.
"Honestly? Thank you." — he seems relieved.
"I know I don't deserve it, but... thank you."
He will answer for what he did, but without completely destroying his life.
Kaeda doesn't fully agree, but respects your decision.
[KAEDA] "You're a better person than me. I hope you're right."
The chip reveals a network of gamblers that leads to places you never imagined.
This is bigger than one corrupt engineer. Much bigger.

title: ⚠️ Unprepared Confrontation
text: You don't have all the evidence. You don't have the ideal plan.
But you have courage. Or stubbornness.
Kaeda tries to convince you to wait.
[KAEDA] "You're not ready. We can wait another day."
[KAEDA] "If you go in like this, the chances are... slim."
You insist. You won't wait.

choices.label: Insist — go in now (⚠️ extreme danger)
Wait — go back and prepare better

title: 🏆 Victory
text: Arc 1 is over.
The Integrity Engineer is no longer a threat.
NULL_ENTITY has been defeated.
Kaeda is by your side, exhausted but smiling.
[KAEDA] "We did it."
[KAEDA] "But this was just the beginning. The Organization has a name."
She hesitates.
[KAEDA] "And Kronos knows you exist."
The Organization's terminal flashes one last message:
[SYSTEM] "File: mission complete. New data available for Arc 2."
End of Arc 1.

title: 🏆 Victory — By a Hair
text: You won. Barely.
NULL_ENTITY's digital body dissolves into corrupted data.
You're on the verge of collapse — critical HP, SBI overheated.
But you won.
Kaeda appears in the arena, pulls you out before the system crashes.
[KAEDA] "You're crazy. But you did it."
She helps you up.
[KAEDA] "Rest. We continue tomorrow."

title: 💀 Defeat
text: NULL_ENTITY was stronger.
Your avatar dissolves into pixels. The arena disappears.
You wake up in the MDR, disconnected.
The SBI is fried. The Organization's modification is lost.
Kaeda doesn't answer.
You lost. But the token is still here. The experience still counts.
Arc 1 has ended. But your story can continue.

choices.label: Restart — new run with this sheet
